microsoft_ft: Owned end-to-end execution of Azure's recovery validation program, scaling it from a **2-person operation** to a platformized system sustaining 45+ annual compliance drills and driving **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise partners including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling workflows that reduced operational toil by 30% and transformed a manual process into a scalable, repeatable compliance delivery model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability — delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate** — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a continuous validation model adopted across engineering and product teams.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, coordinating accountability across legal, engineering, and operations stakeholders.

Built an internal **AI agent** for drill planning using prompt engineering and workflow automation, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing program capacity by 21% — directly scaling legal-ops-style review throughput without adding headcount.

Maintained real-time operational dashboards tracking drill status, compliance risk, and workstream health, giving leadership data-driven visibility and enabling proactive bottleneck identification across a complex, multi-team program portfolio.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify **81 hours of manual operational toil** per region launch, then built and drove a roadmap to automate critical execution paths — directly reducing compliance risk and scaling delivery capacity.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to track operational toil and automation coverage across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target high-impact gaps, prioritize investment, and maintain data-driven visibility into program health at scale.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies — sprint planning, backlog grooming, and retrospectives — resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process by enforcing accountability to deadlines across cross-functional stakeholders.

Drove strategic alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a repeatable, scalable model for compliance-safe software rollouts.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end operations and managing the scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals through a redesigned CRM workflow, reducing manual overhead and improving stakeholder accountability.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a data-informed digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and local search profiles to improve routing of high-intent prospects.
